TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hrung ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 231 buwan, 553 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 230 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 323 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 38%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hrung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Hrung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hrung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hrung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hrung hya' ga Tbulan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħruŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tβulan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hrung ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 231 buwan, 553 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 230 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 323 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 38%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hrung hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Hrung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hrung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hrung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hrung hya' ga Tbulan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħruŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħruŋ ħjaʔ ɣa tβulan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
